schedule.description: Story 1: Series preview — Cubs vs. Tigers, Game 1 of 3
Story 3: Taillon activated — what it means
Story 4: Trade deadline — 14 days, need pitching
Story 6: Don't sleep on Detroit Tigers
Story 7: Pre-game hype — Taillon at Wrigley

stories.title: Cubs Open 3-Game Home Series vs. Detroit Tigers — Taillon Returns (Mandatory Series Preview)
stories.angle: Cubs 56-43 open a 3-game home series vs. Tigers 46-53 at Wrigley. Jameson Taillon returns from hamstring IL in Game 1 opener. Jack Flaherty starts for Detroit. 7:05 PM CT.

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
```
Cubs open a 3-game home series vs. the Detroit Tigers tonight at Wrigley Field.

Jameson Taillon returns from the IL in the opener. Jack Flaherty starts for Detroit. First pitch 7:05 PM CT.

The Wild Card race runs through nights like this.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
```

stories.title: Game Recap — Cubs 10, Twins 1 (Series Win; Imanaga/Hoerner/Bregman)
stories.angle: Cubs win the Twins series 2-1 behind Imanaga's 7 shutout innings; Hoerner goes 4-for-4 for the SECOND straight day (also 4-for-4 July 18); Bregman 2-run HR; Cubs now 56-43

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
```
Cubs 10, Twins 1. Shota Imanaga threw 7 SHUTOUT innings.

Nico Hoerner went 4-for-4 for the SECOND straight day, with a bases-loaded triple that blew the game open. Bregman opened the scoring with a 2-run shot.

Cubs take the series. 56-43. 🔥

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
```
x_posts.tweet_type: Bold/fan energy (morning slot moved off 7 AM due to mandatory series preview)

stories.title: Jameson Taillon Activated — What His Return Means for the Rotation
stories.angle: Taillon officially activated today; started throwing again July 5 (High-A) and July 11 (Triple-A — 4.2 IP, 0 ER); rotation ERA 4.33 (21st in MLB); starts tonight vs. Detroit

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
```
Jameson Taillon is BACK for tonight's series opener vs. Detroit.

He made two IL rehab starts — including 4.2 IP, 0 runs at Triple-A — and Craig Counsell activated him today.

Rotation ERA: 4.33. Deadline: 14 days. This is big.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball
```

stories.title: Trade Deadline — 14 Days Left, Cubs Need Pitching Now
stories.angle: August 3 deadline 14 days out; Civale acquired from A's July 18; Joe Ryan (3.36 ERA) reportedly a top target; rotation has 4.33 ERA, 5 starters on IL; Hoyer: "expectation is we focus on pitching"

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
```
14 days to the August 3 deadline. The Cubs' rotation has a 4.33 ERA and 5 pitchers on the IL.

They already grabbed Aaron Civale from the A's. Joe Ryan (3.36 ERA) is reportedly a top target.

This front office better be on the phone right now. 📞

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball
```

stories.title: Nico Hoerner — Back-to-Back 4-for-4 Games
stories.angle: Hoerner went 4-for-4 Saturday AND 4-for-4 Sunday including a bases-loaded triple; the quiet backbone of this lineup; feature/appreciation angle

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
```
Nico Hoerner went 4-for-4 on Saturday. Then 4-for-4 again on Sunday.

Back-to-back identical stat lines — including a bases-loaded triple in Sunday's rubber match.

He's the quiet anchor of this lineup. Completely dialed in. ⚾

#Cubs #GoCubs #ChicagoCubs
```

stories.title: Don't Sleep on the Tigers — Detroit's Hidden Danger
stories.angle: Tigers 46-53 overall but 18-12 since June 1 (best in AL over that span); rotation ERA 3.48 (4th in baseball); Troy Melton 5-1, 1.82 ERA; they're a more dangerous opponent than their record implies

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
```
Detroit is 18-12 since June 1 — the best record in the AL over that span.

Their rotation ERA is 3.48 (4th in baseball). Troy Melton is 5-1 with a 1.82 ERA.

The Cubs are favorites tonight. But this series is not a breather. 👀

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB
```

stories.title: Pre-Game Hype — Taillon Takes Wrigley, 7:05 PM CT
stories.angle: Taillon's return at home, 56-43 Wild Card leaders, every series win matters in the playoff race, Detroit on a run

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
```
Jameson Taillon makes his return at Wrigley tonight. First pitch 7:05 PM CT.

The Cubs are 56-43 and first in the Wild Card. Detroit comes in on an 18-12 run.

This isn't just a series opener — it's a statement game. 🔵⚪

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs
```
